hero.headline: South Florida's Most Trusted Pool Experts
hero.subheadline: For over 35 years, our family-owned team has kept pools sparkling across Palm Beach, Broward, and Miami-Dade Counties. Licensed, insured, and factory-trained technicians you can count on.
checkmarks: GPS-tracked fleet for reliable, on-time service
Serving all three South Florida counties

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full remodels, our licensed team handles every aspect of pool and spa care for homes and businesses.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Customized weekly cleaning and chemical balancing for residential and commercial pools, spas, fountains, and water features. Your pool stays swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repair
cards.description: Factory-trained technicians diagnose and fix any pool or spa issue fast. From pump failures to heater malfunctions, we get your system running right.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your aging pool into a modern backyard centerpiece. Full reconstruction services for tile, plaster, decking, and equipment upgrades.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Hotels, HOAs, and condominiums trust our GPS-equipped fleet for dependable commercial pool maintenance across all of South Florida.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: We install and service top brands like Pentair, Hayward, AquaCal, Jandy, and Zodiac. Factory-authorized for warranty-backed installations.

cards.title: Water Feature Service
cards.description: Specialized care for interactive water features, decorative fountains, and spa systems. Keep every water element performing beautifully.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We will set up a free on-site evaluation of your pool or spa at a time that works for you.

steps.title: Get a Custom Plan
steps.description: Our licensed technicians inspect your pool, identify any issues, and build a tailored maintenance or repair plan with transparent pricing.

steps.title: Relax, We Handle It
steps.description: Sit back while our GPS-tracked team delivers consistent, professional service. You will always know when we have been there and what we did.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1991
about.headline: Three Decades of Pool Expertise You Can Trust
about.description: Shamrock Pool Services is a family-owned company that has been serving South Florida since 1991. As a State of Florida licensed commercial pool and spa contractor, we bring 35 years of hands-on expertise to every job. Our factory-trained technicians are certified on the latest pool technology, and our GPS-equipped fleet ensures we show up on time, every time. From backyard pools to large commercial facilities, we treat every customer like family.

features.title: Factory-Trained Technicians
features.description: Every technician on our team is factory-certified by leading manufacturers, ensuring expert-level knowledge on every service call.

features.title: GPS-Tracked Fleet
features.description: Our entire fleet is GPS-equipped so you always know when we arrived, how long we stayed, and exactly what was done.

features.title: 35-Year Family Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with a service visit? We will come back and make it right at no extra charge. Our family reputation depends on it.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pool Service Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Every plan is customized to your pool's exact needs with upfront, honest pricing.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise to You
guarantee.description: With 35 years in business and a State of Florida commercial license backing every job, we stand behind our work completely. If you are not satisfied with any service visit, we will return and make it right at no extra charge. That is the Shamrock family commitment.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in South Florida?
faqs.answer: We provide pool service throughout Palm Beach County, Broward County, and Miami-Dade County. Our GPS-equipped fleet allows us to efficiently cover all three counties with reliable, on-time service.

faqs.question: Are you licensed for commercial pool work?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold a State of Florida Commercial Pool and Spa Contractor license (CPC1459481) and carry full insurance. We are qualified for everything from residential pools to large commercial facilities.

faqs.question: What pool equipment brands do you work with?
faqs.answer: We are factory-authorized for leading brands including Pentair, Hayward, AquaCal, AutoPilot, Jandy, Zodiac, and Gulf-Stream. Our technicians receive ongoing factory training to stay current.

faqs.question: How does your GPS fleet tracking benefit me?
faqs.answer: Every service vehicle in our fleet is GPS-equipped, which means we can verify exactly when your pool was serviced and how long our technician was on-site. It ensures accountability and consistent service.

faqs.question: Can you customize a maintenance plan for my pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We tailor every maintenance program to each client's specific pool, spa, or water feature. During your free assessment, we will design a plan that fits your needs and budget.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: Shamrock has maintained our community pool for years. Their technicians are always professional, on time, and thorough. The GPS fleet tracking gives us peace of mind knowing exactly when service is completed.

testimonials.name: Maria S.
testimonials.text: As a family-owned business, they treat every pool like it is their own. After 35 years in business, their experience really shows in the quality of their work and customer service.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.text: We needed a complete pool remodel and Shamrock handled everything from equipment upgrades to new tile. Licensed, insured, and factory-trained. They are the real deal in South Florida.

contact.headline: Ready for a Pool You Can Actually Enjoy?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool assessment from South Florida's most experienced family-owned pool company.
benefits: Transparent pricing with no hidden fees

footer.description: Shamrock Pool Services is a family-owned, State of Florida licensed commercial pool and spa contractor serving South Florida since 1991. From weekly maintenance to full remodels, we keep your pool in perfect condition.
footer.service_area: Serving Palm Beach County, Broward County & Miami-Dade County
